name: creative-studio
description: Creative Studio — Flask app, no Node build step. The `build` and `test` scripts are no-op stubs preserved for the camster91/* Node-CI workflow which runs `npm ci && npm run build` against every repo. Real Python tests run via `make test` (pytest).

scripts.build: echo 'No Node build step — Flask app, see Makefile'
scripts.test: echo 'No Node tests — see `make test` for pytest'
scripts.lint: echo 'No Node lint — see `make lint` for Python checks'
